senior.title: feat: browser governance invariants — scope, state, and pacing for browser agents
senior.note: Assigned. Design phase — 3rd EM cycle with no implementation. Open questions: action class (browser.* vs shell.exec extension), URL scope matching strategy, pacing correction feedback. Begin stub definitions in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts. Coordinate with architect on action class decision.

secondary.title: feat: irreversible action detection — human confirmation gates for one-way operations
secondary.note: Assigned. Design phase — 3rd EM cycle. PauseRequested/PauseResolved event schema already exists in packages/events/src/schema.ts (Go kernel HITL). Start with packages/kernel/src/decision.ts hook for irreversible flag detection. Policy integration: new `confirm` action type in policy evaluator.

blockers.title: [dogfood] no-governance-self-modification blocks EM squad state writes to .agentguard/squads/
blockers.note: Persists — 3rd cycle. Fix: narrow OPERATIONAL_STATE_PATTERNS in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts to exclude .agentguard/squads/**. Write tool workaround in use.
